scripts.assets:generate: node scripts/generate-store-assets.mjs && npx capacitor-assets generate --assetPath assets --iconBackgroundColor '#2563EB' --iconBackgroundColorDark '#1D4ED8' --splashBackgroundColor '#2563EB' --splashBackgroundColorDark '#1D4ED8'
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.build:ios: npm run cap:sync && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath build/BuildEasy.xcarchive archive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.build:android: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease bundleRelease
scripts.build:mobile: npm run build:ios && npm run build:android
